title: Create idea 10Pcs 25mm Pulley Rope Nylon Hanging Pulleys Clothesline Pulleys for Indoor Patios Balconies Rooftop Walls Installations 38x6mm
features: The diameter of each pulley is 25mm, with reasonable design, which can smoothly carry the clothes drying rack and ensure easy drying of clothes.
The size of the mounting screw is 38x6mm, and the design is compact, which is easy to install in a limited space, saving space and keeping it neat and beautiful.
Widely used on the walls of indoor terraces, balconies or roofs, it meets various needs of drying clothes, convenient and practical.
Made of nylon material, it has good wear resistance and corrosion resistance, suitable for long-term use and not easy to age.
Each set contains 10 pulleys, suitable for batch use, meeting home and commercial needs.
